headline: Why Amphenol (APH) Is Becoming a Core Picks-and-Shovels Supplier for AI Data Centers
summary: Amphenol Corporation (NYSE:APH) is one of the fastest-growing AI infrastructure stocks to buy. On June 11, 2026, Evercore reiterated Amphenol as a top AI data center infrastructure pick, pointing to its role in high-speed interconnects, connectors, cables, and power products used across increasingly dense AI systems.
